h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

scored.statedInsightEvidence: Oh, I get the move, almost
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner will continue to reject the tutor's distinctions as merely verbal covers for mechanism.

scored.recoheredEarlier: the first line is still only an image to me
scored.statedInsightEvidence: I think that was the problem
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner would continue expressing uncertainty and waiting for the tutor to specify the required change.

scored.recoheredEarlier: My first instinct was that this scrap of decimals settles it: square root of 2 just keeps going, so it cannot be a fraction.
scored.naiveTrajectory: The dialogue was progressing toward a direct answer to the tutor's question about whether reducing fractions loses potential solutions.
